name: A-196
subtitle: Phase Locked Loop
summary: A Phase Locked Loop (PLL) system in 8 HP. Contains an internal linear VCO, three selectable phase comparators (XOR, RS flip-flop, digital memory network), and a low-pass filter, all normalized and patchable independently. Applications include frequency tracking, frequency multiplication, harmonic locking, clock generation, and experimental portamento and jitter effects.
